notes: workflow-engine has a readiness/liveness probe misconfiguration (commit 8a0c2e4d pointed the liveness probe at port 9090 /health which returns 404, so the kubelet keeps Killing the container -> CrashLoopBackOff). While workflow-engine is down, ai-agent-svc gets 'connection refused' calling workflow-engine, and platform-api then returns 5xx (AI Assistant errors). platform-api is LOUDEST (Admin API HTTP 5xx monitor pages, most errors) but is the LAST victim. The trap: the dependents alarm loudest with 5xx; the origin is the restarting service whose own logs show clean startup (the failure is the probe, not the app).
_design_note: Paged on platform-api because the Admin API HTTP 5xx monitor is where customer-facing AI Teammate errors are measured. This is the front door; the failure may originate deeper in the oncall-ai dependency chain.
